evidence.details: Failed to fetch https://pypi.org/simple/librosa/ due to dns error and temporary failure in name resolution.

attempts.root_cause_hypothesis: The uv backend is compatible, but sandboxed execution cannot reach PyPI, so dependency resolution cannot complete inside the restricted environment.

evidence.details: uv venv failed with 'Could not create temporary file' under /root/.cache/uv on a read-only file system.

attempts.root_cause_hypothesis: The uv cache directory was not explicitly redirected for the venv creation command.
